about.title: About 2906
about.story_p1: 2906 Estate is an Agents Collective founded in 2025 by Olga Baldinska, drawing on over 8 years of experience in Malta's real estate market. She brought together a network of seasoned independent agents working across the Maltese archipelago — from Sliema's seafront to Gozo's quiet villages.
about.story_p2: We combine deep local expertise with a personal, considered approach — helping clients find not just a property, but the right one.
